summary: Frontend testing complete for Edit Modal simulation UI (Preview Impact). All 12 features tested successfully. Edit modal has 3 buttons in footer: Cancel, Preview Impact (secondary), Save Changes (primary). Preview calls simulate API and shows Impact Summary panel with correct fields. State resets on modal close. Save works independently.

code_quality_warnings.issue: React console warning: 'Switch/Select is changing from controlled to uncontrolled'. This happens when closeEdit() sets editForm to {} which causes controlled inputs to lose their values.
code_quality_warnings.fix_suggestion: Initialize editForm with default values instead of empty object, or don't render form inputs when editRule is null

code_quality_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent
code_quality_warnings.fix_suggestion: Add DialogDescription to the edit modal or provide aria-describedby prop

test_results.edit_modal_3_buttons_in_footer: PASS - Cancel, Preview Impact (secondary), Save Changes (primary) all present
test_results.impact_summary_shows_all_fields: PASS - Matched Devices: N, Would Escalate: Yes/No, Severity: X, Evaluation Window: N minutes
test_results.preview_not_auto_triggered: PASS - Impact Summary panel hidden before first Preview click
test_results.state_reset_on_modal_close: PASS - Closing and reopening modal clears preview state via useEffect
test_results.save_works_independently: PASS - Save Changes works without requiring Preview first
test_results.save_closes_modal_shows_toast: PASS - Modal closes and 'Rule updated' toast appears
test_results.preview_with_invalid_json: PASS - Shows 'Invalid JSON' error, modal does not crash
test_results.all_3_rules_can_preview: PASS - low_battery, signal_degradation, reboot_anomaly all show Impact Summary
test_results.toggle_switches_work: PASS - All 3 toggle switches found on table
test_results.history_buttons_open_drawer: PASS - Clicking history button opens audit log drawer

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented: preview-impact-btn, impact-summary-panel, sim-matched-count, sim-would-escalate, sim-severity, sim-window, sim-device-list, sim-error, edit-rule-save, edit-rule-cancel
Impact Summary panel uses plain text format (h4 + p/strong) as specified
Preview button is variant='secondary' in DialogFooter as specified
useEffect correctly resets previewResult and previewError when editRule becomes null
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Modal simulation UI testing complete. All features work as specified: Preview Impact button in footer (secondary variant), Impact Summary panel shows matched devices count, would escalate, severity, evaluation window. State resets on modal close. Save works independently. Minor code quality warnings: controlled/uncontrolled React warnings when modal closes, and missing DialogDescription accessibility warning. No functional issues.
